summary:
The ghrelin receptor possesses constitutive activity, meaning it activates signaling pathways independently of ligand presence. PF-05190457 suppresses this baseline signaling, reducing appetitive behavior such as hunger and cravings—a hallmark function of an inverse agonist, confirming its classification beyond passive blockade.  

\boxed{A}

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
